# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

# Kong Gateway Production Configuration

# Admin API Configuration
admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8001, 127.0.0.1:8444 ssl
admin_gui_listen = 127.0.0.1:8002, 127.0.0.1:8445 ssl

# Proxy Configuration
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000, 0.0.0.0:8443 ssl http2
stream_listen = 0.0.0.0:9000

# Database Configuration (PostgreSQL)
database = postgres
pg_host = 127.0.0.1
pg_port = 5432
pg_timeout = 5000
pg_user = kong
pg_password = kong_password
pg_database = kong
pg_ssl = on
pg_ssl_verify = on
pg_max_concurrent_queries = 0
pg_semaphore_timeout = 60000

# Database Connection Pool
pg_ro_host = 127.0.0.1
pg_ro_port = 5432
pg_ro_user = kong
pg_ro_password = kong_password
pg_ro_database = kong
pg_ro_ssl = on
pg_ro_ssl_verify = on

# DNS Configuration
dns_resolver = 8.8.8.8:53,8.8.4.4:53
dns_hostsfile = /etc/hosts
dns_order = LAST,SRV,A,CNAME
dns_valid_ttl = 3600
dns_stale_ttl = 3600
dns_not_found_ttl = 30
dns_error_ttl = 1
dns_no_sync = off

# Cluster Configuration
cluster_listen = 0.0.0.0:8005
cluster_control_plane = 127.0.0.1:8005
cluster_mtls = shared
cluster_cert = /path/to/cluster.crt
cluster_cert_key = /path/to/cluster.key
cluster_ca_cert = /path/to/cluster_ca.crt
cluster_server_name = kong_clustering
cluster_telemetry_listen = 0.0.0.0:8006
cluster_telemetry_endpoint = 127.0.0.1:8006

# Nginx Configuration
nginx_user = kong kong
nginx_worker_processes = auto
nginx_daemon = on
nginx_http_client_body_buffer_size = 8k
nginx_http_client_max_body_size = 10m
nginx_proxy_proxy_buffer_size = 128k
nginx_proxy_proxy_buffers = 8 64k

# Performance and Limits
mem_cache_size = 128m
worker_consistency = eventual
worker_state_update_frequency = 5

# Logging
log_level = notice
proxy_access_log = logs/access.log
proxy_error_log = logs/error.log
admin_access_log = logs/admin_access.log
admin_error_log = logs/admin_error.log

# Plugins
plugins = bundled
pluginserver_names = 
lua_package_path = ./?.lua;./?/init.lua;
lua_package_cpath = 
lua_socket_pool_size = 30

# Security
trusted_ips = 
real_ip_header = X-Real-IP
real_ip_recursive = off
ssl_protocols = TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3
ssl_prefer_server_ciphers = on
ssl_ciphers = ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:ECDHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:ECDHE-ECDSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384:ECDHE-RSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384
ssl_session_tickets = on
ssl_session_timeout = 1d

# SSL Certificates
ssl_cert = /path/to/ssl/cert.pem
ssl_cert_key = /path/to/ssl/cert-key.pem
admin_ssl_cert = /path/to/admin-ssl/cert.pem
admin_ssl_cert_key = /path/to/admin-ssl/cert-key.pem
client_ssl_cert = 
client_ssl_cert_key = 

# Headers
headers = server_tokens, latency_tokens
nginx_http_server_tokens = off

# Anonymous Reports
anonymous_reports = off

# Vitals and Monitoring
vitals = on
vitals_ttl_days = 365
vitals_strategy = prometheus

# Portal Configuration
portal = off
portal_gui_protocol = http
portal_gui_host = 127.0.0.1:8003
portal_gui_use_subdomains = off
portal_session_conf = {"secret":"super-secret","cookie_name":"portal_session","storage":"kong","cookie_secure":true}
portal_cors_origins = *

# Status Server
status_listen = 0.0.0.0:8100
status_access_log = off
status_error_log = logs/status_error.log

# Prefix Paths
prefix = /usr/local/kong/
nginx_conf = /usr/local/kong/nginx.conf
nginx_kong_conf = /usr/local/kong/nginx-kong.conf
nginx_kong_stream_conf = /usr/local/kong/nginx-kong-stream.conf

# Router Configuration
router_flavor = traditional
router_consistency = strict
router_update_frequency = 1

# Upstream Configuration
upstream_keepalive_pool_size = 60
upstream_keepalive_max_requests = 100
upstream_keepalive_idle_timeout = 60

# Client Configuration
client_body_buffer_size = 8k
client_max_body_size = 10m
